questions.q: Amid Disney layoffs confirmed on April 20, 2026, Andy Park announced his exit after 16 years as the Director of Visual Development for which studio?
On April 21, 2026, which Japanese animation studio announced the establishment of a new in-house games publishing brand focusing on new IPs?
Searchlight Pictures released the official trailer on April 20, 2026, for the third installment of which cult comedy franchise from the Broken Lizard comedy troupe?
The April 2026 'Infinite Darkness' expansion pack for 'SUPER ROBOT WARS Y' adds playable units from multiple mecha anime, including which iconic series?
On April 20, 2026, pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly agreed to a deal worth up to $7 billion to acquire which clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on in vivo CAR-T therapy?
On April 21, 2026, which video streaming platform announced it was opening up an AI deepfake detection tool to all of Hollywood to flag potentially infringing content?
In April 2026, which defending two-time French Open tennis champion put his tournament participation in doubt due to a right wrist injury?

A study highlighted on April 20, 2026, found that popular AI chatbots are giving users potentially dangerous medical advice, frequently offering non-scientific alternatives to what common cancer treatment?
According to April 20, 2026 news reports, President Trump is pushing to fast-track research into which psychedelic drug for mental health treatments?
Which Los Angeles Dodgers closer was placed on the injured list and slated for elbow surgery in April 2026?
